epigraph.quote: Glorious sunshine, breakfast at a convenient picnic table next to the van.

moments.quote: Jonathan, Charlotte, Abigail & Tom gave us a delicious lunch. We saw their tortoises, 2 baby tortoises, border terries, cat & aviary.
v. pretty, but only one small hut with one loo & cold water basin
lovely clean modern loo block, continental, infra-red light comes on as you walk in

images.caption: 1826 aquatint by John Nash of kitchen, Royal Pavilion, Brighton
